patterns.description: Port 3000 already in use by another process
patterns.auto_fix_command: lsof -ti:3000 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null && sleep 1 && echo 'Port 3000 freed'

patterns.description: No AI provider API key is configured
patterns.auto_fix_command: grep -c 'ANTHROPIC_API_KEY\|GEMINI_API_KEY\|OPENROUTER_API_KEY' .env 2>/dev/null && echo '.env has API keys configured' || echo '.env may be missing API keys -- add one at console.anthropic.com or aistudio.google.com'
patterns.success_indicator: At least one AI provider API key is configured

patterns.auto_fix_command: curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages --max-time 5 2>/dev/null || echo 'anthropic timeout' && curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com --max-time 5 2>/dev/null || echo 'gemini timeout'
echo 'Testing connectivity: api.anthropic.com generativelanguage.googleapis.com openrouter.ai' && echo 'Run nslookup for DNS check: nslookup api.anthropic.com'
echo 'Browser localStorage full -- user must clear site data or reduce cached scans. Recommend: localStorage.clear() in dev console'

patterns.description: JSON parse error -- likely API response format changed
patterns.auto_fix_command: echo 'JSON parse error -- check upstream API responses via /api/debug for recent error patterns'

test -f .subscriptions.json.bak && node -e "try{JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.subscriptions.json.bak','utf-8'));console.log('backup valid')}catch(e){console.log('backup corrupt')}" 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'backup valid' && cp .subscriptions.json.bak .subscriptions.json && echo 'Restored from backup' || echo 'No valid backup -- starting fresh'

test -f .timelines.json.bak && node -e "try{JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.timelines.json.bak','utf-8'));console.log('backup valid')}catch(e){console.log('backup corrupt')}" 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'backup valid' && cp .timelines.json.bak .timelines.json && echo 'Restored from backup' || echo 'No valid backup -- starting fresh'

patterns.description: A required dependency module is missing
patterns.auto_fix_command: npm install 2>&1 | tail -5

patterns.description: Node.js process ran out of memory
patterns.auto_fix_command: echo 'Current NODE_OPTIONS='${NODE_OPTIONS:-'not set (default 128MB)'}' -- increase to --max-old-space-size=1024 and restart via ./restart.sh'
curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' https://api.stripe.com --max-time 5 2>/dev/null || echo 'Stripe unreachable' && echo 'Check STRIPE_SECRET_KEY in Stripe Dashboard'

patterns.description: Rate limit reached for an IP address
patterns.auto_fix_command: echo 'Rate limit hit -- auto-clears in ~60s. Reset window by tier: discover=20 collector=60 pro=120 req/min'

patterns.description: Rate limit hit on API calls
patterns.auto_fix_command: sleep 5 && echo 'Rate limit backoff complete -- retry now available'

patterns.description: DNS resolution failed for upstream API
patterns.auto_fix_command: echo 'DNS test: api.anthropic.com generativelanguage.googleapis.com openrouter.ai' && nslookup api.anthropic.com 2>&1 | grep -i 'name\|address' | head -2 || echo 'DNS failed' && echo 'Fix: restore default DNS or use 8.8.8.8'
echo 'ALLOWED_ORIGIN='${ALLOWED_ORIGIN:-'not set (default localhost:3000)'}' -- set to your domain (no wildcards allowed)'

patterns.description: License key or token not verified
patterns.auto_fix_command: echo 'Check SUBSCRIPTION_SECRET matches between sessions' && test -f .subscriptions.json && node -e "try{const s=require('./.subscriptions.json');console.log('Active subscriptions:',Object.keys(s.subscriptions||{}).length)}catch(e){console.log('DB status: check')}" 2>/dev/null || echo 'No subscription DB found'
echo 'Verify STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET matches the signing secret in Stripe Dashboard > Webhooks'
df -h / 2>&1 | tail -1 && du -sh trace_events.log trace_db.sqlite node_modules 2>/dev/null | sort -rh | head -5 && echo 'Free space: rotate logs and prune node_modules if safe'

patterns.description: SQLite database is locked by another connection
patterns.auto_fix_command: sleep 2 && echo 'Database retry attempted after 2s backoff. If persistent, check for write contention.'

patterns.description: Uploaded image could not be decoded
patterns.auto_fix_command: echo 'Supported formats: JPEG PNG WebP. Max upload: 10MB. Re-encode image and retry.'
curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://localhost:3000/health --max-time 5 2>&1 | grep -q '200' && echo 'Server healthy' || echo 'Server health check failed -- restart via ./restart.sh'

patterns.description: Service worker registration or update failed
patterns.auto_fix_command: echo 'Clear service worker via dev console and hard refresh (Cmd+Shift+R)'
free -m 2>/dev/null | head -2 || vm_stat 2>/dev/null | head -5 && echo 'Current NODE_OPTIONS='${NODE_OPTIONS:-'not set'}' -- increase to --max-old-space-size=1024 and restart via ./restart.sh'
echo 'Testing SSL connectivity for upstream APIs' && echo 'If local SSL cert expired, check SSL_KEY_PATH/SSL_CERT_PATH in .env'

patterns.description: Headers already sent -- response sent twice
patterns.auto_fix_command: echo 'Route handler sent response twice -- check for missing return statements in trace_server.js route handlers (especially after sendJSON calls)'
patterns.success_indicator: Route handler sends response only once

patterns.auto_fix_command: echo 'Max request body size: 10MB. Request rejected. User should reduce image size or split into multiple requests.'
echo 'Valid tiers: discover collector professional. Invalid value received -- likely stale cache. User should reload page.'

patterns.description: All configured AI providers returned errors -- service degraded
patterns.auto_fix_command: echo 'ALL PROVIDERS FAILED -- check API keys in .env and credit balances at each provider dashboard' && curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'anthropic=%{http_code}' https://api.anthropic.com --max-time 5 2>/dev/null || echo 'anthropic=unreachable' && curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'gemini=%{http_code}' https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com --max-time 5 2>/dev/null || echo 'gemini=unreachable' && curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'openrouter=%{http_code}' https://openrouter.ai --max-time 5 2>/dev/null || echo 'openrouter=unreachable'
echo 'CRITICAL: OpenRouter credits low. Add funds at openrouter.ai/settings/credits or switch AI_PROVIDER to gemini/claude in .env'

scripts.kill_port_3000: lsof -ti:3000 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null && sleep 1 && echo 'Port 3000 freed'
scripts.check_env_key: grep -c 'API_KEY' .env 2>/dev/null && echo 'API keys found in .env' || echo 'No API keys in .env'
scripts.prune_local_storage: echo 'User must clear browser cache manually'
scripts.validate_api_response: echo 'API validation requires manual inspection of latest response'
scripts.restore_subscription_backup: test -f .subscriptions.json.bak && cp .subscriptions.json.bak .subscriptions.json && echo 'Backup restored' || echo 'No backup found'
scripts.restore_timeline_backup: test -f .timelines.json.bak && cp .timelines.json.bak .timelines.json && echo 'Backup restored' || echo 'No backup found'
scripts.clear_rate_limit_cache: echo 'Rate limit auto-clears after reset window'
scripts.regenerate_license: echo 'Use admin panel to regenerate license key'
scripts.check_stripe_webhook: echo 'Verify webhook secret matches Stripe Dashboard'
scripts.retry_subscription_check: echo 'Subscription API check via health endpoint'
scripts.unregister_service_worker: echo 'Clear service worker via dev console and hard refresh'
scripts.check_route_handlers: echo 'Check for missing return statements in route handlers'

metadata.change_log: Deduplicated 15 duplicate patterns. All 29 patterns now have actionable auto_fix_command with no blocked characters. Added 2 new patterns: 'All AI providers failed', 'credits critically low'. Fixed compatibility with agent.js safety filter.
